name: Xiangyang Changyuandonggu Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Xiangyang Changyuandonggu Industry Co., Ltd. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of diesel engine parts to companies and manufacturers. It primarily offers cylinder blocks, heads, flywheel housings, connecting rods, engine covers, exhaust pipes, and gearboxes. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Xiangyang, China.
